prompt: Maori warrior performing a haka, displaying traditional tattoos, with New Zealand's stunning landscape in the background.
prompt_refined: A powerful Maori warrior, in a dynamic full-body pose, fiercely performs a haka. Traditional Maori facial moko and body tattoos are prominently displayed. The background features a vast and stunning New Zealand landscape with lush green valleys and majestic, snow-capped mountains under a dramatic sky.
